text:
is the second story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

After witnessing the horror of the Titans, Eren Jaeger, Mikasa Ackermann, and Armin Arlelt decide to undergo military training and enroll as members of the 104th Cadet Corps. There, they get to know the rest of the cadets and slowly begin to understand the hardships of being a soldier.
